sutta: [Music] monks pursuing 5 courses among is not fit to draw apart from the sangha or order but 5 here in monks a monk is not content with any rope with any arms with any lodging with any medicines and he dwells full of lustful purpose amongst pursuing these 5 courses among is not fit to draw apart from the sangha at the end of the sutta
commentary: this refers to living alone there are certain monks who are capable of living alone certain monks were not capable of living alone and here is the monk who is not capable of living alone if he's not easily satisfied now with any type of rope or food or lodging or medicines and also he has a lot of lust if he has a lot of lustful thoughts then wherever he goes even though he is physically alone but he's not alone because these classroom thoughts is his company you know keeping him company so such a manga is not fitness to dwell alone the next suta is
